import io
import string
import list

fn add_tokens(_ nums: List<Int>, _ toks: List<String>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = nums
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        if not list.contains(result, n)
          result = list.push(result, n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < nums.len()
    match nums.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      mut newlist: List<Int> = []
      mut inserted = false
      mut m = 0
      while m < sorted.len()
        match sorted.get(m)
        when Some(y)
          if not inserted and x < y
            newlist = list.push(newlist, x)
            inserted = true
          end
          newlist = list.push(newlist, y)
        when None
          ()
        end
        m = m + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        newlist = list.push(newlist, x)
      end
      sorted = newlist
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let toks1 = string.split_whitespace(line1)
let toks2 = string.split_whitespace(line2)

let empty: List<Int> = []
let combined = add_tokens(add_tokens(empty, toks1), toks2)
let result = sort_unique(combined)

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
while p < result.len()
  match result.get(p)
  when Some(v)
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
